title: Ultra Performance
description: A modpack to boost your performance, and add a few QOL mods
body:
# Ultra Performance A modpack Dedicated to providing you with the best performance.
List Of Mods Dynamic FPS
Entity Culling
Sodium
Fabric API
Exordium
Fabric Language Kotlin
FerriteCore
ImmediatelyFast
IrisShaders
LambDynamicLights
LazyDFU
Lithium
Midnight Controls
ModMenu
MoreChatHistory
MouseTweaks
NoChatReports
Reese's Sodium Options
Starlight
YetAnotherConfigLib
Zoomify
YourOptionsShallBeRespected
Any suggestions on mods to add can be emailed to artsign@skiff.com
